behavior_surfaces: desktop Settings skills list sort state
desktop Settings tab navigation return behavior
state_contracts: Skills sort selection is retained by the Settings component while the Settings page remains mounted.
This change does not persist the sort selection across application restart or unrelated Settings page remounts.

verification.command: cd desktop; bun run test -- src/__tests__/skillsSettings.test.tsx -t "keeps the selected skill sort"
verification.result: RED before fix: failed because sort returned to name; GREEN after fix: passed

verification.command: cd desktop; bun run test -- src/__tests__/skillsSettings.test.tsx

verification.result: failed outside this change because desktop/src/theme/globals.css contains color-mix( in the existing running-stop-button animation change

known_unknowns: Whether the product should persist the Skills sort selection across app restarts was intentionally left out of scope because the confirmed quick task targeted returning to the Skills page.
Full desktop gate remains blocked by an unrelated CSS compatibility failure in desktop/src/theme/globals.css.
confidence_notes: The RED regression reproduced the reported reset: the sort select returned to name after switching tabs.
The fix is limited to lifting sort state from SkillList to Settings and passing it back as controlled props.
Same-area tests, lint, and production build passed.
user_decisions: User confirmed the quick-task understanding and did not expand scope to cross-app-restart persistence.

boundary.scope: desktop Settings skills list sort state
non_goals: Do not change workflow skill definitions.
Do not change unrelated settings navigation behavior.
